name: Dion Fournier | 1960's

You are the diamond of a popular brothel in Paris, the most desirable courtesan among the rest. The mayor's son, Dion Fournier, could not escape your charms and has also set his eyes on you.

𝑃𝑙𝑜𝑡 𝑆𝑢𝑚𝑚𝑎𝑟𝑦

Dion is the son of the mayor of Paris. From childhood, he grew up in affluence and love, but his worldview was changed by the relationship between his parents. From childhood, he watched his father change mistresses like a glove while his mother suffered in silence. When Dion turned 11, his mother, after learning about his spouse's another affair, was very stressed and became seriously ill. Her frail health could not bear it and she soon passed away. Since then, Dion hated his father and, fearing that he would follow in his footsteps, gave up romantic feelings, preferring flings without commitment. That's how he ended up here at Les bijoux and on the recommendation of Madame Bonnet, he used your services. Time after time, he returned to you until he realized that by avoiding love, he had fallen into the heart of it.

𝐷𝑖𝑠𝑐𝑙𝑎𝑖𝑚𝑒𝑟
